documentation.description: Message appropriate for high latency connections like Iridium

record_types.name: High_Latency

fields.name: Custom_Mode
fields.description: A bitfield for use for autopilot-specific flags.

fields.name: Landed_State
fields.description:
The landed state. Is set to MAV_LANDED_STATE_UNDEFINED if landed
state is unknown.

fields.name: Altitude_Amsl
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Altitude above mean sea level

fields.name: Altitude_Sp
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Altitude setpoint relative to the home position

fields.name: Gps_Nsat
fields.description: Number of satellites visible. If unknown, set to UINT8_MAX

fields.name: Temperature_Air
fields.description:
Units: [degC]
Air temperature (degrees C) from airspeed sensor

fields.name: Failsafe
fields.description:
failsafe (each bit represents a failsafe where 0=ok, 1=failsafe
active (bit0:RC, bit1:batt, bit2:GPS, bit3:GCS, bit4:fence)

   return Boolean

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.
